doc: Random seed for randomization (reproducible when set). Must be a positive integer.
Number of new geometries to generate. Must be a positive integer.
Maximum distortion for Cartesian coordinates (Angstroms). The sign is altered randomly.
Maximum distortion for bond distances (Angstroms). The sign is altered randomly.
Maximum distortion for angles (degrees). The sign is altered randomly.
Maximum distortion for torsions (degrees). The sign is altered randomly.
Whether to report the RMSD after internal-coord and after Cartesian alteration. Requesting the RMSD will increase the computational time significantly.

tag: generation of ZMatrix from the input structure
the input/output of chemical objects (e.g., molecular geometries)
